IFilterPropertyProviderTryGetFilterPropertyAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the filter property, or a failed result if the filter is not available in this session.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.DataSources.SqlWizard
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513

C#
